summary: Tested new Income/Expense Approval System on Accountant Dashboard. All 9 features verified: Approvals Tab renders with 5 summary cards (Total Pending, Income, Materials, Labour, Suppliers), sub-tabs work with empty states, Source column in expense table shows 'Manual' badge, backend GET /api/approvals/unified returns correct structure, backend POST approve/reject endpoints exist and work, Super Admin user exists in DB, forgot password endpoint works, refresh button works, and both accountant/super_admin roles can access AccountsBoard.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed - 2 initially failed due to rate limiting, retested manually)

test_credentials.production_admin: urbanspacebuilderstech@gmail.com (no password - use forgot password flow)

seed_data_creation: Created test expense with source=manual to verify Source column
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Approval System added to AccountsBoard.jsx: (1) ApprovalsTab component at line ~1577-1874 with summary cards and sub-tabs for Income/Material/Labour/Vendor, (2) Source column added to expense table at line ~850 and ~936-939, (3) Backend endpoints at /api/approvals/unified (GET), /api/approvals/income/{id}/approve (POST), /api/approvals/income/{id}/reject (POST), (4) Super Admin urbanspacebuilderstech@gmail.com auto-created at server startup (line 159-179 in server.py), (5) Forgot password at /api/auth/forgot-password. Rate limiting is 5 req/min for login - wait 60s between login test batches.
